positive: A stylized, geometric line art depiction of a serene woodland scene. The composition features minimalist silhouettes of diverse fauna (deer, foxes, owls, rabbits) interacting subtly with stylized plant life (ferns, moss, wildflowers). The arrangement must be highly central and balanced, creating a cohesive patch-like design suitable for a T-shirt print. Use a limited, earthy color palette (deep forest green, slate grey, terracotta orange, cream). The style should mimic modern vector illustration combined with Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. High contrast, clean lines, thick yet elegant outlines, perfect negative space utilization. Studio shot, graphic design concept.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, cropped, grainy, noise, poor composition, muted colors
